scripts.build-js: esbuild Static/js/site.js Static/js/admin.js Static/js/signin-redirect.js Static/ts/etherna-qrcode.ts Static/ts/etherna-web3-signin.ts Static/ts/etherna-fido2.ts --bundle --minify --format=iife --outdir=wwwroot/dist/js --entry-names=[name] --log-level=warning
scripts.build-production: npm run build-js && npm run build-css
scripts.watch: esbuild Static/js/site.js Static/js/admin.js Static/js/signin-redirect.js Static/ts/etherna-qrcode.ts Static/ts/etherna-web3-signin.ts Static/ts/etherna-fido2.ts --bundle --format=iife --outdir=wwwroot/dist/js --entry-names=[name] --watch
